title: My earning is no longer tied to my hours
subtitle: A release-and-allow statement for loosening the time-for-money exchange.
excerpt: A short energy statement from Day 30 of the MONEY program for when income and hours still feel like the same thing.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 30 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). Release/allow structure from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use when you feel reluctant to rest because stopping work means stopping income.

content.text: A short energy statement from Day 30 of the MONEY program. The time-for-money exchange is a structure, not a law. This statement names the current one and opens room for a different arrangement.
I am ready to release the belief that my earning stops when my hours stop. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow income that is no longer tied to my hours. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Drawn from Day 30 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release/allow structure is the core method of The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
